name: Obsidian Assistant Capture
description: Adds an owner-only /capture command backed by the local Obsidian Assistant queue.

bridgeCommand.description: Absolute path to the obsidian-assistant executable.

workerEnvFile.description: Absolute path to a dedicated worker env file without Telegram or LLM secrets.

ownerIds.description: Numeric Telegram sender IDs allowed to invoke the bridge.

processImmediately.description: Ask the worker to process this request immediately; worker dry-run policy still wins.
